title: Junior Frontend Developer at IndiaMart Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at IndiaMart Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
IndiaMart Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About IndiaMart Advisory Limited:
IndiaMart Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaMart Advisory Limited!
